home.hero: Luxury travel, shaped around your life.

language.title: Language
language.description: Switch the site language. Untranslated content falls back to English.

header.aboutIntro: We shape each journey around the people travelling: precise routing, thoughtful hotels, trusted guides and enough breathing room to feel the place.

otherServices.title: Other Services
otherServices.heading: Useful extras
otherServices.intro: Add the small logistics that make a private journey easier: cars, tickets, SIM cards, visa support and rental requests.

asiaVisa.label: Asia Visa
asiaVisa.description: Open the visa registration form inspired by the Visa2Asia order flow.

bikeMotorbike.label: Bike & Motorbike Rental
